patient_input: My child is 4 years old, has had a high fever of 103 for two days, and is crying when looking at bright lights.
recommended_action: Immediate referral to nearest hospital. Potential indicator of meningitis.

patient_input: I have had a dry cough for a week and my throat feels a bit scratchy. No fever.
recommended_action: Rest, hydration, and home remedies. Monitor for fever.

patient_input: I am 6 months pregnant and woke up with severe bleeding and stomach cramps.
recommended_action: Call ambulance or arrange immediate transport to emergency maternal care unit.
